ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Running) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was recorded */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the activity */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity in kilometers */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "time" TEXT /* Total duration of the activity */,
  "avg_hr" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "max_hr" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate during the activity */,
  "total_elevation_gain" INTEGER /* Total elevation gain during the activity in meters */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the activity in Celsius */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the activity (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., standard, admin) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity related to these metrics */,
  "avg_run_cadence" INTEGER /* Average running cadence during the activity */,
  "max_run_cadence" INTEGER /* Maximum running cadence during the activity */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the activity */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed during the activity */,
  "elev_gain" INTEGER /* Total elevation gain during the activity */,
  "elev_loss" INTEGER /* Total elevation loss during the activity */,
  "avgStrideLength" REAL /* Average stride length during the activity */,
  "avg_power" REAL /* Average power during the activity in Watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gait_metrics" (
  "gait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gait metric entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity related to these gait metrics */,
  "avg_stride_length" REAL /* Average stride length during the activity */,
  "avg_vertical_ratio" REAL /* Average vertical ratio during the activity */,
  "avg_vertical_oscillation" REAL /* Average vertical oscillation during the activity */,
  "avg_ground_contact_time" INTEGER /* Average ground contact time during the activity in milliseconds */,
  "avg_gct_balance" TEXT /* Average balance of ground contact time between left and right legs */,
  "toe_strike" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a toe striker */,
  "heel_strike" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a heel striker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gait_metrics_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the challenge */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the challenge */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "challenge_type" TEXT /* Type of the challenge (e.g., running, cycling) */,
  "challenge_distance" REAL /* Distance of the challenge in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant entry */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the user has joined */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the challenge */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the challenge */,
  "completion_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user has completed the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_participants_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of the goal (e.g., distance, time, calories) */,
  "goal_value" REAL /* Value of the goal (e.g., 100 km, 10 hours) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the goal */,
  "is_achieved" INTEGER /* Whether the goal has been achieved */,
  "goal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the goal (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Feedback text provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of user login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time of user logout */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "login_location" TEXT /* Location of the user during login (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who unlocked the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of the achievement (e.g., distance, speed, endurance) */,
  "unlock_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was unlocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wearable_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who connected the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date the device was connected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wearable_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_routines" (
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each routine entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the routine */,
  "routine_name" TEXT /* Name of the routine */,
  "routine_type" TEXT /* Type of the routine (e.g., running, strength training) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the routine was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("routine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_routines_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
